response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced polyglot Staff Engineer with direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and high-throughput microservices. While his background strongly aligns with the architectural and AI-native requirements of the role, his complete lack of Python experience on the resume—a strict must-have—makes him a borderline candidate who would need to rapidly upskill in the core stack.
strengths: Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq.
Proven ability to design high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Strong ownership and operational mindset, demonstrated by founding an open-source data platform and extensive CI/CD experience.
concerns: Lacks any mentioned Python experience, which is listed as a must-have technical skill for the role.
A history of relatively short tenures (1-2 years) in several recent senior roles, which may impact long-term technical strategy execution.
Heavy reliance on niche languages like DLang for high-performance backend work rather than mainstream ecosystem tools.
